headings.text: Focal Diva Utopia: High-End Performance in a Wireless System
Focal Diva Utopia: High-End Performance in a Wireless System

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingFocal Diva Utopia: High-End Performance in a Wireless SystemPosted on October 23, 2024Focal Diva Utopia: High-End Performance in a Wireless SystemFocal has unveiled its newest creation, the Diva Utopia—a sophisticated, two-box wireless loudspeaker system that seeks to redefine high-end audio for modern living spaces.Priced at $39,999, the Diva Utopia promises an audiophile experience without the clutter of traditional high-end systems. But does it live up to its price tag and ambitious design goals? Let’s explore.‍‍Design and ArchitectureAt first glance, the Diva Utopia looks like a traditional floor-standing speaker, but its beauty lies in its all-in-one design. Unlike passive speakers that require multiple components, the Diva Utopia integrates everything needed for top-tier audio performance right within its sleek enclosures. The system includes a streamer, multiple DACs, electronic crossovers, DSP for driver and room correction, and wireless connectivity, eliminating the need for most external components. Each speaker also houses Class A/B amplification, with 400 watts of total power spread across the tweeters, midrange drivers, and side-firing woofers.The Diva Utopia's portless design is made from a high-density polymer that provides excellent rigidity, minimizing vibrations and resonance. Focal opted for a soft fabric finish instead of the traditional wood or lacquer, which enhances its appeal for modern décor. The combination of form and function makes it clear that this speaker is intended not only to sound good but to look at home in stylish, contemporary settings.‍‍‍Setup and FeaturesThe ease of setup is a significant selling point of the Diva Utopia. Simply unbox the speakers, roll them into position, plug them into an AC outlet, and connect an ethernet cable to start streaming. The accompanying FocalNaim control app (available on iOS and Android) allows users to manage streaming services like Qobuz and Tidal, ensuring high-resolution music delivery with minimal effort.The system also supports Ultra Wideband (UWB) wireless connectivity between the speakers, capable of streaming up to 24-bit/96kHz. For even higher resolution audio, a wired connection allows for streaming up to 24-bit/192kHz. The Diva Utopia also integrates seamlessly with home control systems like Crestron, HomeKit, and voice assistants like Google Assistant and Siri.‍‍PerformanceDespite being an all-in-one system, the Diva Utopia is capable of exceptional sound quality, rivaling many traditional, component-based systems. During a demonstration in New York City, the speakers impressed with their ability to deliver natural transient attack and decay, traits often associated with more specialized equipment like electrostatics or horns. These characteristics are a testament to the speaker’s finely tuned electronic crossovers and amplification.The Diva Utopia excels in imaging as well, offering a coherent soundstage that remains consistent even when listening off-axis. This is especially appealing for group listening situations, making the system more versatile than traditional stereo setups that confine the “sweet spot” to a narrow listening area.‍‍Flexibility and ProtectionBeyond its audiophile credentials, the Diva Utopia is built for real-world use. With support for HDMI eArc and optical inputs, the speakers can double as a high-end solution for home theater setups. There's even an analog input for vinyl enthusiasts, although the signal is digitized before being processed. Focal also designed the Diva Utopia to be durable; the system incorporates a Safe Operating Area feature, ensuring that the speakers won’t be damaged during high-volume playback, making it perfect for parties or casual listening at higher volumes.‍VerdictThe Focal Diva Utopia offers a unique combination of audiophile sound quality, ease of use, and integration with modern living spaces. It delivers impressive performance, rivalling more expensive, traditional separates, but without the clutter of cables and external electronics. Its $39,999 price tag might seem steep, but when considering the cost of high-end speakers and electronics that the Divas replace, it becomes a compelling option for those who want a sophisticated, top-tier audio experience in a simplified, elegant package.‍‍‍If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Yasin or Charley.‍‍‍‍‍‍‍‍Services:Home CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworking‍Proudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca Valley ‍Engage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA 92211NavigationHomeServicesBrandsExciting ProductsPortfolioAboutCareersContactServicesHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingExciting ProductsBrowse some of the most exclusive products we can bring to your next technology installation.Find out moreProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca ValleyCopyright © 2023.
